description: Register Profile + Manager Admin pages migrated to Gutenberg + form styling standardization

changes.description: Migrated Register Profile page (ID 79) from Elementor to Gutenberg
Migrated Manager Admin page (ID 10) from Elementor to Gutenberg - 4-tile dashboard layout with footer
Migrated Manager Actions page (ID 84) from Elementor to Gutenberg - tabbed interface with placeholders
Updated Managers page (ID 8) - Admin card now links to /managers/admin
Standardized Select Role and Login form styling (500px container, 40px padding, consistent button styles)
Added role parameter capture (td_user_role) to Forminator form via hidden-1 field
Updated button hover colors - all buttons (white, navy, auth) use #0062e3 on hover with white text
Removed Elementor plugin - all pages migrated to Gutenberg

pre_checks: Verify local Register Profile page displays correctly
Verify local Manager Admin page displays correctly
Verify role parameter capture in local database
steps: Push wp-content/ to main branch (triggers Hostinger auto-deploy)
Manually update Register Profile page content in production WordPress admin
Manually update Manager Admin page content in production WordPress admin
Update Forminator form 80 in production (add hidden-1 field with prefill=td_user_role)
Upload custom CSS files to config/custom-css/ on production
Delete Sample Page (ID 2) from production WordPress admin
Deactivate Elementor plugin in production WordPress admin
Delete Elementor plugin in production WordPress admin
Run cleanup SQL: infra/shared/db/260215-1030-cleanup-elementor-data.sql on production database
post_checks: Verify Register Profile page loads at /register-profile/
Verify Manager Admin page loads at /admin
Test Select Role → Register Profile redirect with parameter
Test form submission and check database for hidden-1 field
Verify button styling (navy for Select Role, blue for Submit)
Verify admin dashboard tiles display correctly
Verify Sample Page (ID 2) deleted - /sample-page/ should return 404

steps: Restore Register Profile page from restore/pages/register-profile-79.html backup
Restore Manager Admin page from restore/pages/manager-admin-10.html backup
Revert CSS files from restore/pages/ backups
Remove hidden-1 field from Forminator form or restore from backup

notes: Register Profile page now uses Gutenberg with Forminator shortcode [forminator_form id="80"]
Manager Admin page migrated to Gutenberg with 4-tile dashboard (User & Role Management, System Settings, Audit Logs, Platform Monitoring)
Manager Admin cards section horizontal padding fixed (40% column width, centered layout)
Manager Actions page migrated to Gutenberg with tabbed interface (Submitted, Approved, Rejected, All)
Manager Actions tabs show "Under Development" placeholders for future approval workflow
Managers page Admin card is now clickable and navigates to /managers/admin
Role capture uses dual approach: Forminator built-in prefill + JavaScript fallback
Form styling now consistent across Select Role, Login, and Register Profile pages
Sample Page (default WordPress content) removed - serves no purpose in production
All backups stored in restore/pages/ and restore/forms/ directories
Button hover color standardized to #0062e3 (was #3498DB) with white text and no underline
Logout functionality fixed - menu item now points to /wp-login.php?action=logout with dynamic nonce generation
Elementor plugin removed - all 16 pages migrated to Gutenberg (100% complete)
Elementor database cleanup removes all _elementor* postmeta, options, and usermeta
Migration completed 13 days ahead of schedule (Feb 15 vs Feb 28 target)
